scripts.build: vite build && sh -c 'for r in services services/kitchen-exhaust-cleaning services/grease-filter-exchange services/commercial-kitchen-deep-cleaning services/pressure-washing services/high-access-facade-cleaning services/kes-installation services/scheduled-maintenance-programs services/window-cleaning services/industrial-cleaning services/soft-washing industries industries/government-institutional industries/restaurants-cafes industries/hotels-pubs-clubs industries/shopping-centres industries/food-production industries/facility-property-managers industries/multi-site-groups projects field-notes compliance-reporting contact; do mkdir -p "dist/$r" && cp dist/index.html "dist/$r/index.html"; done; cp dist/index.html dist/404.html'
